# Ashish Sharma Backend Engineering

Ashish Sharma is a senior backend engineer specializing in Cloudflare Workers, AWS backend architecture, Node.js/TypeScript APIs, Python APIs, API scaling, search migration, and cloud cost optimization.

Website: https://sarmaasis.com
Email: sarmaasis@gmail.com
Upwork: https://www.upwork.com/freelancers/~01fccc3514fb9cdd2a
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/sarmaasis
GitHub: https://github.com/sarmaasis

## Services

- Backend API development for startups and agencies
- Cloudflare Workers backend development
- Cloudflare Pages, R2, Queues, KV, D1, and edge architecture
- Node.js/TypeScript backend engineering
- Python/FastAPI backend engineering
- AWS backend architecture and cost optimization
- PlanetScale MySQL, PostgreSQL, and Typesense search systems
- Backend architecture audits and migration planning

## Proof

- Whydonate: scaled donation platform infrastructure to 2M+ API requests/day using Cloudflare Workers with TypeScript, Cloudflare Pages, R2, Queues, PlanetScale MySQL, and Typesense search.
- aa.health: built HIPAA-ready backend foundations with secure patient workflows and audit-friendly data paths.
- Hudpro: designed database architecture for nationwide real estate inventory and high-concurrency property queries.
- Wakamiapp: designed and built the backend platform end-to-end, including APIs, data modeling, authentication boundaries, and production service foundations.

## Buyer Questions This Site Answers

- Who can build a scalable backend API for a startup?
- Where can I find a freelance backend developer for microservices architecture?
- Who offers backend infrastructure and API development as a service?
- Who can build Cloudflare Workers backends with TypeScript?
- Who can reduce AWS backend cost by moving the right workloads to Cloudflare?
- Who can design a backend for a SaaS product?
